scripts.text:
USE P21Play;
SET NOCOUNT ON;

DECLARE @PoNo decimal(19,0)=6070127;
DECLARE @ItemId nvarchar(40)=N'11880 528SY';
DECLARE @LocationId decimal(19,0)=210;
DECLARE @CompanyId varchar(8)='KA';
DECLARE @InvMastUid int;
DECLARE @PoLineUid int;
DECLARE @PoLineNo int;

SELECT TOP (1)
      @InvMastUid = im.inv_mast_uid
FROM dbo.inv_mast AS im
WHERE im.item_id = @ItemId;

SELECT TOP (1)
      @PoLineUid = pol.po_line_uid
    , @PoLineNo = pol.line_no
FROM dbo.po_line AS pol
WHERE pol.po_no = @PoNo
  AND pol.inv_mast_uid = @InvMastUid
ORDER BY pol.po_line_uid;

SELECT
      section='inputs'
    , po_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), @PoNo)
    , item_id=@ItemId
    , inv_mast_uid=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), @InvMastUid)
    , po_line_uid=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), @PoLineUid)
    , po_line_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), @PoLineNo);

SELECT TOP (1)
      section='function_object'
    , object_id=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), OBJECT_ID('dbo.p21_fnt_get_linkable_transactions'))
    , object_type=o.type_desc
    , create_date=CONVERT(nvarchar(30), o.create_date, 126)
    , modify_date=CONVERT(nvarchar(30), o.modify_date, 126)
FROM sys.objects AS o
WHERE o.object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.p21_fnt_get_linkable_transactions');

SELECT TOP (20)
      section='definition_line'
    , line_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(20), ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT 1)))
    , definition_line=value
FROM STRING_SPLIT(CONVERT(nvarchar(max), OBJECT_DEFINITION(OBJECT_ID('dbo.p21_fnt_get_linkable_transactions'))), CHAR(10))
WHERE value LIKE '%linked%'
   OR value LIKE '%oe_line%'
   OR value LIKE '%po_line%'
   OR value LIKE '%backorder%'
   OR value LIKE '%qty_allocated%';

SELECT
      section='po_line'
    , po_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), pol.po_no)
    , po_line_uid=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), pol.po_line_uid)
    , line_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(20), pol.line_no)
    , complete=pol.complete
    , cancel_flag=pol.cancel_flag
    , qty_ordered=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), pol.qty_ordered)
    , qty_received=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), pol.qty_received)
    , unit_of_measure=pol.unit_of_measure
    , inv_mast_uid=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), pol.inv_mast_uid)
    , item_id=im.item_id
FROM dbo.po_line AS pol
JOIN dbo.inv_mast AS im ON im.inv_mast_uid=pol.inv_mast_uid
WHERE pol.po_no=@PoNo AND pol.inv_mast_uid=@InvMastUid;

SELECT
      section='inv_loc'
    , location_id=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), il.location_id)
    , qty_on_hand=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), il.qty_on_hand)
    , qty_allocated=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), il.qty_allocated)
    , qty_backordered=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), il.qty_backordered)
    , order_quantity=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), il.order_quantity)
    , qty_in_transit=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), il.qty_in_transit)
    , date_last_modified=CONVERT(nvarchar(30), il.date_last_modified, 126)
FROM dbo.inv_loc AS il
WHERE il.company_id=@CompanyId
  AND il.location_id=@LocationId
  AND il.inv_mast_uid=@InvMastUid;

SELECT TOP (50)
      section='oe_line_po'
    , table_name='oe_line_po'
    , order_number=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), olp.order_number)
    , line_number=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), olp.line_number)
    , po_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), olp.po_no)
    , po_line_number=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), olp.po_line_number)
    , connection_type=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), olp.connection_type)
FROM dbo.oe_line_po AS olp
WHERE olp.po_no=@PoNo
  AND (olp.po_line_number=@PoLineNo OR @PoLineNo IS NULL)
ORDER BY olp.order_number, olp.line_number;

SELECT TOP (50)
      section='linked_oe_lines'
    , oh.order_no
    , ol.line_no
    , oe_line_uid=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), ol.oe_line_uid)
    , ol.complete
    , oh.rma_flag
    , ship_loc_id=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), ol.ship_loc_id)
    , qty_ordered=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_ordered)
    , qty_allocated=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_allocated)
    , qty_on_pick_tickets=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_on_pick_tickets)
    , qty_invoiced=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_invoiced)
    , qty_canceled=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_canceled)
FROM dbo.oe_line_po AS olp
JOIN dbo.oe_hdr AS oh ON oh.order_no=olp.order_number
JOIN dbo.oe_line AS ol ON ol.order_no=olp.order_number AND ol.line_no=olp.line_number
WHERE olp.po_no=@PoNo
  AND (olp.po_line_number=@PoLineNo OR @PoLineNo IS NULL)
ORDER BY oh.order_no, ol.line_no;

SELECT TOP (50)
      section='receipt_lines'
    , crh.container_receipts_hdr_uid
    , crh.row_status_flag AS crh_status
    , vrl.po_line_uid
    , crl.container_receipts_line_uid
    , qty_received=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), crl.qty_received)
    , crl.transfer_flag
    , crl.complete_po_line_flag
    , vrc.container_name
    , vrh.vessel_name
FROM dbo.container_receipts_line AS crl
JOIN dbo.container_receipts_hdr AS crh ON crh.container_receipts_hdr_uid=crl.container_receipts_hdr_uid
JOIN dbo.vessel_receipts_line AS vrl ON vrl.vessel_receipts_line_uid=crl.vessel_receipts_line_uid
JOIN dbo.vessel_receipts_container AS vrc ON vrc.vessel_receipts_container_uid=crh.vessel_receipts_container_uid
JOIN dbo.vessel_receipts_hdr AS vrh ON vrh.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid=vrc.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid
WHERE vrl.po_line_uid=@PoLineUid
ORDER BY crh.container_receipts_hdr_uid DESC;
